nf/quick-337-fast-path-initial-diagnosti.task_description: Add require-path tracing to sweepTtoR and @req annotations to 8 domain-named test files to eliminate T→R false positives
nf/quick-337-fast-path-initial-diagnosti.approach: Add require-path tracing instrumentation to sweepTtoR function and @req annotations to 8 domain-named test files to suppress T→R false positive findings.
out_of_scope: Modifying test assertions or test logic itself
Creating new test files or test suites
Refactoring sweepTtoR algorithm or its core matching logic
Updating formal requirements.json or invariant definitions
